name: PNG Mathematics Grade 9 MVP Curriculum Knowledge Base
purpose: Lightweight structured curriculum files for teacher selection and multi-agent lesson/resource generation.

files.curriculum_records.json: Merged syllabus + teacher guide records. Main source for agents.
files.syllabus_records.json: Syllabus-only records: strands, content standards, benchmarks, evidence outcomes.
files.indexes.json: Fast lookup indexes and selection tree.
files.chunks.jsonl: Syllabus and teacher-guide text chunks for lightweight RAG/context.

notes: Use curriculum_records.json as the source-of-truth object passed to agents.
Use indexes.json for fast local lookup without a database.
Use chunks.jsonl only when the agent needs supporting text.
Manual topic input should pass through a curriculum matching step before generation.
